UNITED
UNITED
Proud to fly Team USA for over 35 years
COWSHED
Made in England
A cow shed seems an unlikely origin for
award-winning bath, body and skincare products,
but that's exactly where ours were born.
Cowshed
opened its first spa in the old cow shed af
Babington House in Somerset, UK in 1998, and
we have since been the exclusive spa, bath, body
and skincare brand for the Soho House Group.
We still believe that there are few things in life
better than an English country garden and
continue to be inspired by mother nature. The
scents, botanical ingredients and herbal remedies
remain the basis for our ever-expanding range of
honest and natural products. They are made in
England using the very best organic, wildcrafted
and fairly-traded plant extracts and essential oils.

properties.sfomuseum:description: Amenity kit issued by United Airlines for United First class service on U.S. transcontinental flights promoting Team USA during the 2016 Olympic Games in Rio de Janeiro; in multiple parts:a. silver metal amenity kit cover with lid, raised aircraft with jetstream silhouette, logo and Team USA logo on top.b. blue paper sleeve with printed logo, Team USA logo and text “Proud to fly Team USA for 35 years” on center.c. sleep mask;d. toothpaste;e. sealed in plastic bag, toothbrush;f. sealed in plastic bag, earplugs;g. lip balm;h. sealed in plastic bag, two small packets of hand sanitizer;i. product brochure.
properties.sfomuseum:medium: metal, plastic, fabric, cosmetic products, foam, paper, ink
